commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 2:13 And now I have sent a skillful man, endued with understanding, Huramabi, Father. Hebrew Abi, is considered by some as the surname of Hiram. (Pagnin) But he might have that title in consideration of his great skill, as Solomon gives it him, chap. We use master in the same sense. Septuagint have, "servant "(Greek: paida) except the Roman edition, which agrees with the Hebrew and reads, Greek: patera. (Calmet) Protestants, "of Huram, my father's "(Haydock) supply servant, or architect.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
